projects.title: Research notebook
projects.languages: Astro 6 SSR, Payload CMS 3, PostgreSQL, Docker
projects.description: Self-hosted personal research notebook, a self-hosted equivalent to an Hypothèses notebook. Astro SSR + Payload CMS stack in Docker, no tracker, no external dependency.

projects.title: Korai
projects.description: MVP of a business application to manage a pooled humanitarian logistics platform: service requests, stock management, transport operations, purchasing, security, finance and invoicing. Independent modules connected to a cross-cutting dashboard.

projects.title: Nodea
projects.languages: React 19, Hono, Drizzle ORM, PostgreSQL, OPAQUE + WebAuthn
projects.description: End-to-end encrypted, self-hostable personal tracking web app (journal, mood, goals, habits, reading list, yearly review). Everything is encrypted in the browser before reaching the server — not even the instance admin can read it.

projects.title: 2 Mains de Femme
projects.languages: Astro 6 SSR, Tailwind, Payload CMS 3, PostgreSQL, Docker
projects.description: Redesign of the public website for the Lyon-based 2 Mains de Femme association. Self-hosted Astro SSR + Payload CMS architecture, with team training on content management.

projects.title: Watizat (WebApp)
projects.description: Project to digitise the Watizat association's guides. The application lets users browse the guides, filter them by category and edit the data (back-office). Guides are also geolocated on a map. The application is responsive and works on desktop, mobile and tablet.

projects.title: My resume
projects.description: Rebuilding my CV online as an alternative to LinkedIn, and as a showcase for my different projects.

projects.title: Migrappi
projects.description:
Rebuild of an application for collecting and processing data on exiled people received, for the NGO Caritas in Morocco.
Interface modelling and front-end build before handing over to a service provider.
